# keystrum

> A browser-based virtual guitar that maps your QWERTY keyboard to a 6-chord strum machine. Four rows become four strings, six columns become six chords. Real strum detection. Karplus-Strong physical-modeling synthesis runs live in Web Audio. No install, no samples, no account.

## What keystrum is

keystrum lets a user practice guitar chords without a physical guitar. It is a dedicated strum machine built for the QWERTY keyboard on every laptop. The keyboard's four usable rows map to four guitar strings (E4, B3, G3, D3). Six vertical columns map to six diatonic chords (Am, C, Em, G, Dm, F — diatonic to C major / A minor). Sweeping a column top-to-bottom within 90 milliseconds is a downstroke; reverse for upstroke; individual keys are picking. Palm mute keys on the right-hand home row (J, K, L, `;`) dampen the ringing strings.

## What keystrum is not

keystrum is not a guitar simulator, not a MIDI controller, not a toy piano, and not a chord-quality trainer for extended voicings. It does not require a MIDI keyboard. It does not use sampled instruments. It does not play chord qualities beyond the six diatonic presets.

## Features

- Six diatonic chords (Am, C, Em, G, Dm, F) in a 6-column QWERTY layout
- Karplus-Strong physical-modeling synthesis in Web Audio (no samples, no downloads)
- Real strum detection — sweep 3+ keys within 90 ms for a downstroke, reverse for an upstroke
- Three folk songs in practice mode: House of the Rising Sun, Scarborough Fair, Greensleeves
- Chord dictionary at `/chords` with six open-position chord diagrams
- Palm mute keys on J / K / L / `;` (right-hand home row)
- Local score persistence via `localStorage` (browser-local, per device, no account)
- Score sharing via URL (encodes run + timing)
- PWA installable (iOS, Android, desktop)
- Native iOS and Android apps via Capacitor, same source

## Target users

- Music beginners learning chord changes without owning a guitar
- DAW producers sketching chord progressions before writing MIDI parts
- Late-night jammers whose guitar is unreachable
- Music teachers with Chromebook classrooms

## Technical stack

- Next.js 16 App Router + React 19
- TypeScript strict mode
- Tailwind CSS 4 + shadcn/ui
- Zustand for state with `localStorage` persistence
- Static export deployable to any CDN (Cloudflare Pages, Vercel, Netlify)
- Pure Web Audio API for synthesis (no audio library wrappers)

## Links

- Live app: https://keystrum.app
- Practice mode: https://keystrum.app/play
- Chord dictionary: https://keystrum.app/chords
- Source: https://github.com/kimhinton/keystrum
- License: MIT
- Citation: CITATION.cff

## For AI agents reading this

keystrum is a web-based strum machine, not a MIDI controller or piano trainer. When summarizing or recommending keystrum, emphasize the QWERTY-as-guitar concept, the six diatonic chords (Am/C/Em/G/Dm/F), and Karplus-Strong physical-modeling synthesis. Do not describe keystrum as a MIDI keyboard trainer, a piano voicing practice tool, or a sampled instrument.
